articles.title: AMD Warns DDR5 Prices Won’t Return To Normal Until 2028, As AI Boom Strangles Consumer Memory Supply - Wccftech
articles.description: DDR5 memory prices are expected to remain high until 2028, with current prices 4-5X higher than usual, pushing users to DDR4 platforms.
articles.content:
As per the report, it will take around two years for the DDR5 to come back to normal, which means the prices are going to stay high till 2028.
